purpose: Property specifications for the ROS 2 LLM error taxonomy categories used in SQ3.

properties.informal_property: Every predicted publisher/subscriber interface type must match the ground-truth topic type.
properties.jani_intent: No reachable architecture state contains topic_name_equal=true and msg_type_equal=false.

properties.informal_property: Every predicted node must exist in the ground-truth node set.
properties.jani_intent: No reachable architecture state contains predicted_node_present=true and ground_truth_node_present=false.

properties.informal_property: Every matched node must be assigned to the same subsystem as the ground truth.
properties.jani_intent: No reachable architecture state contains node_equal=true and subsystem_equal=false.

properties.informal_property: Every ground-truth node must appear in the LLM-generated architecture.
properties.jani_intent: No reachable architecture state contains ground_truth_node_present=true and predicted_node_present=false.

properties.informal_property: Every predicted topic edge must match a ground-truth topic edge for the same node and direction.
properties.jani_intent: No reachable architecture state contains edge_direction_equal=true and topic_name_equal=false.

properties.informal_property: Lifecycle-node status must match between generated architecture and ground truth.
properties.jani_intent: No reachable architecture state contains node_equal=true and lifecycle_equal=false.
